## Safety and documentation

- [ ] Tests are fully offline and use `MockP4Runner` where Perforce behavior is involved.
- [ ] No credentials, tickets, private depot paths, or real server details are included.
- [ ] `docs/SPEC.md` is updated in this PR if an interface or documented behavior changed.
- [ ] UI changes include desktop and narrow-viewport screenshots.
